schema.format: string — LinkedIn post, newsletter issue, Insights piece, Resources page, website update
schema.title: string
schema.objective: string — one of: Generate consulting leads, Sell products, Build authority, Increase newsletter subscribers, Support website SEO
schema.triggerSource: string — id or reference to the regulatory-log.json entry, CRM pattern, or LinkedIn discussion that prompted this
schema.result: string — leads generated, subscriber delta, traffic delta, or 'not yet measured'
schema.flaggedTo: array of strings — any of 03-Product-Manager, 08-Revenue-Hunter, 04-Sales-Director this piece was flagged to, if any
